kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 Successful Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then User Should See Success Message
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: TC_002 Failed Login With Invalid Password

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then User Should See Invalid Password Error
Verify Invalid Password Error Displayed
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//div[@id='flash' and contains(text(), 'Your password is invalid!')]' not visible after 10 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: Element 'xpath=//div[@id='flash' and contains(text(), 'Your password is invalid!')]' not visible after 10 seconds.
Element 'xpath=//div[@id='flash' and contains(text(), 'Your password is invalid!')]' not visible after 10 seconds.
Element 'xpath=//div[@id='flash' and contains(text(), 'Your password is invalid!')]' not visible after 10 seconds.

kw.name: And User Should Remain On Login Page
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: Element 'xpath=//div[@id='flash' and contains(text(), 'Your password is invalid!')]' not visible after 10 seconds.

test.name: TC_003 Failed Login With Invalid Username

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then User Should See Invalid Username Error
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: And User Should Remain On Login Page
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'And User Should Remain On Login Page' found. Did you mean: keywords.Then User Should Remain On Login Page
kw.status: No keyword with name 'And User Should Remain On Login Page' found. Did you mean: keywords.Then User Should Remain On Login Page

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: No keyword with name 'And User Should Remain On Login Page' found. Did you mean: keywords.Then User Should Remain On Login Page

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
